      "sectdars__001_k"
    ],
    "pros": "The application demonstrates a clear research vision focused on Explainable AI (XAI) in mechanical ventilation weaning, with a defined career trajectory towards a Clinician Scientist role and Chair. The training plan is well-justified with specific courses in qualitative methods and implementation science. Strong mentorship is evidenced by a multidisciplinary supervisory team with extensive track records (>£5M grants, >80 publications) and a structured weekly meeting framework.",
    "drawbacks": "While the vision is clear, the specific 'distinctive' nature of the ideas (g.1.b) relies heavily on the novelty of the XAI approach which is well-supported but could be more explicitly contrasted with existing non-explainable CDSS in the vision statement itself, though the detailed plan covers this."
  },
  "g.2": {
    "signals": {
      "g.2.a": 5,
      "g.2.b": 5,
      "g.2.c": 5,
      "g.2.d": 5
    },
    "used_chunk_ids": [
      "secarb__001_a",
      "secarb__001_f",
      "secarb__001_i",
      "sectdars__001_a",
      "sectdars__001_f"
    ],
    "pros": "The applicant clearly articulates why this award is the right next step, positioning it as a springboard to gain expert skills in mixed methods and ML to transition from a trainee to an independent researcher. The award is justified as necessary to secure protected time for developing new skills in ML and implementation, building directly on existing data science and clinical experience. It explicitly details how the award will develop research partnerships within the NHS (Guy's & St Thomas', Royal Brompton) and industry.",
    "drawbacks": "No significant drawbacks; the justification is comprehensive and directly addresses all sub-signals with specific examples of skill acquisition and partnership development."
  },
  "g.3": {
    "signals": {
      "g.3.a": 5,
      "g.3.b": 5,
      "g.3.c": 5
    },
    "used_chunk_ids": [
      "secac__001_a",
      "secac__001_b",
      "secac__001_c",
      "secarb__001_a",
      "secarb__001_b",
      "secarb__001_d",
      "sectdars__001_c",
      "sectdars__001_p"
    ],
    "pros": "The applicant lists formal qualifications (MSc, FRCA, MRCP) and extensive clinical/research roles (Academic Clinical Fellow, Fellowships). The research background details specific prior projects (GEMINI, narrative reviews) and formal training (MSc Health Data Science, MSc Medical Education) directly relevant to the proposed study. The training plan includes specific planned courses in qualitative methods and ML, demonstrating a strong alignment between prior experience and the skills required for the proposed project.",
    "drawbacks": "No significant drawbacks; the evidence of relevant experience and training is robust and well-documented across multiple sections."
  },
  "g.4": {
    "signals": {
      "g.4.a": 5,
      "g.4.b": 4,
      "g.4.c": 5,
      "g.4.d": 4
    },
    "used_chunk_ids": [
      "secac__001_d",
      "secac__001_e",
      "secac__001_f",
      "secarb__001_a",
      "secarb__001_d",
      "secarb__001_e",
      "sectdars__001_d",
      "sectdars__001_p",
      "sectdars__001_q"
    ],
    "pros": "The applicant provides a substantial list of peer-reviewed publications in high-impact journals (e.g., Anaesthesia, BMJ, Lancet) and multiple awards (prizes, bursaries, HEA Fellowship). The research background lists 12 publications, 12 abstracts, and a co-edited book, demonstrating a strong track record. The practical impact is highlighted through policy engagement and the development of clinical guidelines.",
    "drawbacks": "While citation metrics are not explicitly quantified in the text (g.4.b), the high-impact journal list serves as a strong proxy. The description of societal impact is present but could be more quantified in terms of patient numbers reached by previous work."
  },
  "g.5": {
    "signals": {
      "g.5.a": 5,
      "g.5.b": 5,
      "g.5.c": 4,
      "g.5.d": 5
    },
    "used_chunk_ids": [
      "secac__001_b",
      "secac__001_c",
      "secac__001_g",
      "secarb__001_d",
      "secarb__001_e",
      "sectdars__001_e",
      "sectdars__001_q"
    ],
    "pros": "The applicant shows clear career ambitions to become a Clinician Scientist and Chair. Evidence of increasing responsibility is demonstrated through roles as Trainee Editor, Chair of Pan-London Network, and EDI Representative, alongside peer review activities. Recognition by peers is evident through multiple prizes and leadership in the GEMINI project.",
    "drawbacks": "Participation in formal leadership programs (g.5.c) is less explicitly detailed compared to the practical leadership roles held, though the training plan addresses this gap."
  },
  "g.6": {
    "signals": {
      "g.6.a": 5,
      "g.6.b": 5,
      "g.6.c": 5,
      "g.6.d": 4
    },
    "used_chunk_ids": [
      "secac__001_b",
      "secac__001_c",
      "secarb__001_a",
      "secarb__001_b",
      "secarb__001_f",
      "sectdars__001_e",
      "sectdars__001_p"
    ],
    "pros": "The applicant explicitly states a commitment to a dual specialist clinical academic track, balancing registrar training with research. The CV demonstrates a clear practitioner-academic trajectory with concurrent clinical training (Anaesthetics/ICM) and dedicated research posts. The research background explicitly states the goal of becoming a Clinician Scientist, balancing full-time clinical work with research training and policy engagement.",
    "drawbacks": "While the commitment is clear, the specific mechanisms for balancing the heavy clinical workload of an ST7 registrar with the demands of a 3-year fellowship are implied but could be more explicitly detailed in terms of protected time allocation strategies."
  }
}

    "pros": "The Plain English Summary demonstrates exceptional readability with a Flesch-Kincaid grade of 5.51 and low jargon density (1.77%). It clearly articulates the problem, objectives, methods, beneficiaries, and impact, with specific evidence of iterative refinement based on patient and public feedback to remove jargon.",
    "drawbacks": "While alignment with the detailed proposal is strong, the lexical overlap metric (0.121) suggests the summary is highly condensed, which is appropriate but leaves little room for nuance in the lay description compared to the technical depth of the full plan."
  },
  "pr.2": {
    "signals": {
      "pr.2.a": 4,

      "secdrp__001_g",
      "secdrp__001_h",
      "secdrp__001_i"
    ],
    "pros": "The application includes a comprehensive narrative review of 2,616 studies, critically analyzing heterogeneity in weaning practices. It clearly identifies the 'black box' limitation of existing CDSS as a specific knowledge gap, justifying the need for explainable AI (XAI).",
    "drawbacks": "The review is described as a narrative review rather than a systematic review, which may limit the comprehensiveness of the evidence base compared to a formal systematic approach, though it is sufficient for a fellowship proposal."
  },
  "pr.3": {
    "signals": {
      "pr.3.a": 5,

      "secdrp__001_~"
    ],
    "pros": "The project scope is highly appropriate for a 36-month fellowship, featuring three distinct, manageable objectives: model development, co-design of visual tools, and simulation testing. The timeline is realistic, with specific data sources (MIMIC-IV, NHS trusts) and risk mitigation strategies included.",
    "drawbacks": "No significant drawbacks identified; the scope is well-calibrated to the award duration and complexity."
  },
  "pr.4": {
    "signals": {

      "secdrp__001_n",
      "secdrp__001_o",
      "secdrp__001_v"
    ],
    "pros": "The research design is rigorous, specifying three neural network architectures (TFT, TCN, LSTM) with 5-fold cross-validation. The human-AI interaction study uses a modified between-subjects design with a power calculation (n=102) and physiological measures of cognitive load, ensuring robust methodology.",
    "drawbacks": "The reliance on simulated vignettes (WP3) rather than live clinical trials may limit the generalizability of findings to real-world chaotic ICU environments, though this is a standard and appropriate approach for a feasibility study."
  },
  "pr.5": {
    "signals": {

      "secdrp__001_e",
      "secdrp__001_y"
    ],
    "pros": "The application explicitly links research outcomes to tangible patient benefits (reduced ventilator time, improved comfort) and NHS benefits (reduced length of stay, cost optimization). It addresses high-priority health needs regarding inconsistent weaning practices.",
    "drawbacks": "The impact is projected based on the successful development of the tool; the actual clinical implementation and long-term cost savings are not yet realized, which is expected for a research proposal."
